concerns.text: The 'Assumptions' section contains a '[NEEDS CLARIFICATION]' marker: 'If a specific variable required for a refined analysis is missing, a [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] marker will be generated.' This violates the convergence rule that a spec at the 'clarified' stage must have NO surviving [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] markers. The assumption must be resolved to a concrete fallback behavior (e.g., 'default to the most populated rigidity bin' as stated in the Data Availability assumption) or removed.
